name: color-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — MEOK AI Labs MCP Server

tools.name: hex_to_rgb
tools.description: Convert hex color to RGB, HSL, and HSV.

tools.name: generate_palette
tools.description: Generate color palette. Schemes: complementary, analogous, triadic, split_complementary, monochromatic, tetradic.

tools.name: check_contrast
tools.description: Check WCAG contrast ratio between two colors.

tools.name: suggest_accessible
tools.description: Suggest accessible text colors for a given background. Targets WCAG AA by default.
